metadata.description: Find a Broadway or theater show in New York City on Ticketmaster, open the event page for one of the results, and use the 'Best Seats' option to view the top recommended seats for 4 tickets

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Find a Broadway or theater show in New York City on Ticketmaster, open the event page for one of the results, and use the 'Best Seats' option to view the top recommended seats for 4 tickets
